assessment_objectives.objective: the means of limiting unsuccessful logon attempts is defined.
the defined means of limiting unsuccessful logon attempts is implemented.
the number of consecutive invalid logon attempts by a user allowed during a time period is defined.
<A.03.01.08.ODP[03]: SELECTED PARAMETER VALUES> when the maximum number of unsuccessful attempts is exceeded.
the time period to which the number of consecutive invalid logon attempts by a user is limited is defined.
the time period for an account or node to be locked is defined (if selected).
delay algorithm for the next logon prompt is defined.
other action to be taken when the maximum number of unsuccessful attempts is exceeded is defined.
a limit of <A.03.01.08.ODP[01]: number> consecutive invalid logon attempts by a user during <A.03.01.08.ODP[02]: time period> is enforced.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters:
SDP values:
[01] - at most five (5)
[02] - period of five (5) minutes

assessment_objectives.objective: one or more of the following PARAMETER VALUES are selected: {the account or node is locked automatically for <A.03.01.08.ODP[04]: time period>; the account or node is locked automatically until released by an administrator; the next logon prompt is delayed automatically; the system administrator is notified automatically; other action is taken automatically}.
